positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for problem_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u31,axiom,
    sP0).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u44,axiom,
    ~baby(luke)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~hangs_out_with_siblings(X0) | lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    ~hangs_out_with_siblings(luke)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(X0) | ~lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth(X0) | hangs_out_with_siblings(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define has_sibling(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complains_annoying_siblings(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
